subject: Re: Garage shelves — what lumber did you decide on?
body:
Janelle,

The 4th of July weekend works perfectly. Your mom is going to be so happy — she's been asking when you all are coming down. Tell Marcus to plan for at least one morning out on the water if the weather cooperates.

I'll have the shelves up by then so you can see how they turned out. Might even have the pegboard started.

See you all soon.
Dad

subject: Re: Juneteenth service — final run of show
body:
Pastor Wilkins,

Thank you for sending the run of show. Understood on the 10:30 call time — I will make sure all four ushers are in position no later than 10:25. I've already confirmed with Brother Thomas and Brother Reeves, and I'll reach out to Brother Calvin today.

I'll keep the center aisle clear during offering and position someone at each side door.

Looking forward to a blessed service.

In His service,
John Baker

subject: Re: Shiloh Baptist Church — June Newsletter
body:
Sister Tate,

Thank you for thinking of me for the food pantry pickup on the 28th. I can do it. What time does the truck usually arrive and is there anyone helping me load? I'll need to know how many boxes we're expecting so I can bring the right vehicle.

God bless,
John Baker
